title: Houthi shipping July 31 vs Saudi action July 31
note: Similar expiry and shared Houthi-escalation driver, but different resolution rules: commercial shipping strike/seizure vs strike impacting Saudi territory.

title: Bab el-Mandeb August 31 vs Saudi action July 24
note: Both can react to regional Houthi escalation, but the Bab el-Mandeb contract resolves on shipping-flow closure rather than a Saudi strike.
